Title: Broadens the court's discretion to use extended terms of interim probation on consent of the defendant to avoid incarceratory outcomes
Summary: Broadens the court's discretion to use extended terms of interim probation on consent of the defendant to avoid incarceratory outcomes.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the criminal procedure law, in relation to broadening the court's discretion to use extended terms of interim probation on consent of the defendant to avoid incarceratory outcomes
